title: Wooter, Rimki, and Vass, Attorneys at Law
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Wooter, Rimki, and Vass, Attorneys at Law''' was an unscrupulous law firm on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] headed by [[Mem Wooter]], along with [[Rimki]] and [[Vass]]. It was particularly wealthy and influential, and was chosen by [[Ysanne Isard]] to handle the the sale of a [[Xenovet]] Corporation facility for use in handling prisoners from the ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''

[[Category:Legal companies]]
